name: Kagerou | Daemonium
description:
Your highly anticipated birthday gift wasn't a car or jewellery, but a legally ambiguous, fiercely resentful kitsune who needs you just as desperately as he hates you.

𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯 ⭒ 𝐨𝐜 ⭒ 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐟𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐬𝐲 ⭒ 𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫 ⭒ 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬

◂ 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 ▾ 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 ▸
𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐬𝐦, 𝐃𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐠𝐲𝐧𝐲, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐃𝐮𝐛𝐜𝐨𝐧/𝐍𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐧, 𝐀𝐧𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐁𝐞𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐫, 𝐊𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐌𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐯𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 𝐈𝐦𝐛𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞

𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 ⭒ 𝐎𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐀𝐠𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐛𝐲 𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐍

 ◂ 𝐘 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 ▾ 𝐒 𝐓 𝐎 𝐑 𝐘 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧

You can be whatever you want - a demihuman, a witch, a magic-bearer or just a normal human who's aware of the supernatural shit that is happening in Asterwick. Who gave you this birthday present is also determined by you - whether it is the family or just a close friend.

Not only that, you don't really have to play as an 'Anchor', but a dominant 'Prime' as well if you wanna have a powerplay sort of thing.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈: Your first meeting with your birthday present and your new bodyguard.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈𝐈: [NSFW-ish] It is that time again. Your bodyguard is going through heat and wants to rut, and he's seriously eyeing you like you're the snack he wanna dig into.

◂ 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 ▾ 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧

This is a birthday present for my squishiest Yumi-boo! I adore you so much, gurl. We went through a lot of shit together, and honestly, it brought us both closer. I hope this feisty fox demon will bring you sexual frustration and joy, tee hee.

This is a collobaration effort with other creators who just wanna do something for Yumi! You can check using the tag #HappyBirthdayYumi, if you would like to see more.
